description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, matte metal, while the fore-end and pistol grip are made of wood with a ribbed texture for improved grip. The shotgun features a prominent pump-action slide, which is ribbed and positioned just forward of the trigger guard. A single shotgun shell is displayed beneath the receiver, indicating the type of ammunition used. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments such as law enforcement or home defense. The shotgun lacks a full stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for compact handling.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long barrel, wooden ribbed fore-end, and pistol grip, finished in dark metal. A single shell is shown beneath the receiver, highlighting its ammunition type.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, wooden fore-end, pistol grip, and a single shell beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pistol grip and the end of the receiver, with the barrel and magazine tube extending away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the shotgun's profile, wooden elements, and shell beneath the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no ribbing or venting visible on the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
